history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible up ahead to the right. I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The cell to my right is free floor, so the best next step is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible up and to the left of my position. I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is safe floor. Moving forward advances me toward the row of the goal while avoiding the lava to my left and the wall to my right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible one row ahead and two columns to the left of my current position. I am facing upward, so the cell directly in front of me is the floor tile at row 06 column D, which is safe. Moving forward advances me toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 07 column C and the walls to the sides.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible immediately to my left on row 07 column B relative to the map, with one safe floor cell between it and my current position at row 07 column D. The cell directly in front of me is the floor cell at row 07 column C, while the cell to my right is a wall at row 07 column E. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible immediately to my left on row 07, with a safe floor cell between my position and the goal. The cell directly in front of me is unknown, while the cell to my right is a wall. To move toward the goal, I should first turn left so I can face the safe floor cell leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible directly ahead in the same column: from my position at row 07 column D, the cells forward are row 06 column D = floor and row 05 column D = goal. The immediate forward cell is safe, so the best next step is to move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06 column D, one cell ahead of my current position at row 07 column D. The forward cell is the goal and is safe to enter, while the cells to the left contain lava and walls block the sides. The best action is to move forward onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
